Precondition: Red box (box_1) accessible; both end effectors grasp nothing; red box not pushed.
Postcondition: Box_1 grasped with dual arms; red box not pushed.

Precondition: Box_1 grasped; placement area on table available; red box not pushed.
Postcondition: Box_1 placed on table; both end effectors grasp nothing; red box not pushed.

Precondition: Green box (box_2) accessible; both end effectors grasp nothing; red box not pushed.
Postcondition: Box_2 grasped with dual arms; red box not pushed.
